name: Sagerunex
description: [Sagerunex](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S1210) is a malware family exclusively associated with [Lotus Blossom](https://attack.mitre.org/groups/G0030) operations, with variants existing since at least 2016. Variations of [Sagerunex](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S1210) leverage non-traditional command and control mechanisms such as various web services.(Citation: Symantec Bilbug 2022)(Cit
